name: Faire Wholesale Marketplace API
what_it_does: Faire REST API for B2B wholesale marketplace connecting independent brands and retailers. Enables AI agents to manage wholesale product catalog and brand listings, handle retailer order management and fulfillment workflows, access Net 60 payment terms and financing data, retrieve brand and retailer analytics and sales reporting, manage inventory and restocking workflows, handle discovery and recommendation data for retailer sourcing, access brand-retailer relationship management, retrieve shipping and fulfillment integration data, manage returns and claims workflows, and integrate wholesale data with inventory management and accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing wholesale product listings from brand catalog automation agents
Handling retailer orders and fulfillment from wholesale operations agents
Accessing sales analytics and retailer performance from brand intelligence agents
Integrating wholesale data with inventory and accounting from brand operations agents
not_for: Direct-to-consumer retail without wholesale B2B marketplace needs
Large enterprise wholesale without independent brand and retailer focus
International-only commerce without US independent retail market
best_when: An independent brand or wholesale buyer using Faire wants AI agents to automate product catalog management, order processing, retailer analytics, inventory restocking, and accounting integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Net 60 payment terms financing — automated order acceptance creates financial exposure for brands. Inventory automation must prevent overselling across Faire and other channels. Returns and claims automation must follow Faire's policies to avoid penalty. Brand pricing on Faire must respect exclusivity and MAP agreements.

auth.notes: Faire uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Brand and retailer-level credentials with catalog, orders, and analytics scopes. Comprehensive developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for order and inventory events. Faire Direct integration for brand-owned wholesale channels.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No API-specific fee — Faire takes commission on wholesale orders
pricing.paid_tiers: Commission-based: 25% on new retailer orders, 15% on returning; Faire Direct reduces to 0%
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Founded 2017. B2B wholesale marketplace for independent brands and retailers. $12.4B valuation (2021). 700,000+ independent retailers, 100,000+ brands. Net 60 payment terms with Faire financing. Faire Direct for brand-owned wholesale. Competes with Orderchamp and Ankorstore for European wholesale.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; catalog operations throttled

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Net 60 financing — automated order acceptance creates cash flow obligations; review credit limits before auto-accepting
Commission structure — Faire Direct vs Faire marketplace have different rates; automation must route orders correctly
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Inventory sync with other channels — Faire inventory must stay in sync to prevent overselling
MAP and exclusivity policy enforcement — verify Faire listing pricing complies with brand agreements
Returns policy automation must comply with Faire's terms — returns outside policy may result in platform penalties
agent_readiness.security_notes: Wholesale marketplace and order data. SOC2, GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US/EU/CA data residency. Brand catalog and retailer relationship data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Wholesale marketplace data. SOC2, GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US/EU/CA data residency. Order and payment data.
